displayTitle: Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 5
synopsis: Collects Star Wars: Dark Empire (1991) #1-6; Star Wars: Dark Empire II (1994) #1-6; Star Wars: Empire’s End (1995) #1-2; Star Wars Handbook (1998) #1 & 3; and material From Star Wars Tales (1999) #8, 11, & 16-17
title: Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 5
